rationale: In the citing paper, Erdem and Sun (2002) appears as part of a grouped citation used to note that cross-category spillovers within umbrella brands are already documented. The paper does not assign this source a distinct role in its model derivation, hypothesis construction, estimation, or result interpretation. Its methodological build is tied more directly to other learning papers (especially Erdem 1998), so this citation functions as broad background framing.
